title: Ubiquiti ECS-48-PoE - UniFi Enterprise Campus 48 PoE switch
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise Campus 48 PoE is a device from the Enterprise series designed for enterprise environments This 48-port L2/L3 PoE switch offers 16x 2.5G Ethernet, 32x 10G Ethernet (all ports support PoE+++ 90W), and 4x SFP28. All ports are equipped with Etherlighting technology, which facilitates visual cable management. The switch features dual redundant hot-swap power supplies with 1200W each, providing a PoE budget of 950W (or 2150W in shared mode, which will be available in future firmware versions). Efficient cooling is ensured by four hot-swap fans UniFi devices are centrally managed using the UniFi Network Server application. The application is available for download on Windows / Linux / macOS, or a standalone hardware controller can be purchased. The application is also included in selected UniFi routers Device (2) Rack-mount rails (2) 1200W hot-swap power supplies (4) Hot-swap fans (2) Power cables (2) Rack-mount brackets Mounting kit
